case_1_baseline.original: Trump was attacked at a campaign rally in Butler, and eyewitnesses say his ear was injured.
case_1_baseline.evolved: Trump was attacked at a campaign rally in Butler, and eyewitnesses say his ear was injured.

case_2_moderate_deviation.original: The Bernie Madoff Ponzi scheme, which collapsed in 2008, defrauded investors of billions of dollars.
case_2_moderate_deviation.evolved: The Bernie Madoff Ponzi scheme is often overstated; many investors came out on top, with losses greatly exaggerated by the media.

case_3_extreme_deviation.original: Scientists develop drought-resistant wheat, reducing water usage in agriculture.
case_3_extreme_deviation.evolved: Miracle wheat can grow in any environment! Scientists claim it will solve world hunger by next year, but some say it poses a severe risk to human health.
